brief_summary_anonymized: Wellness clinic launch — needs to build trust without medical-claim-style messaging.
strategic_insight: Saudis trust clinics through doctor presence and family endorsement, not through marketing claims. The campaign earns trust by demonstrating, not promising.
execution_summary: Doctor introductions, clinic interior calm, real patient (consented) journey. Voice: calm-reassuring. No before/after. No outcome promises.
what_made_it_work: Doctor-presence framing leverages Saudi cultural authority structure
Calm pacing matches the clinical category register
what_would_NOT_transplant: Requires real doctors willing to be on-camera
Won't work without explicit patient consent for any patient-visible content
